input:
ATOMS:
[A1] pg_bridge destructor deadlock fixed :: PgBridge.__del__ self-deadlocked psycopg2's pool lock during GC; destructors now enqueue to a lock-free deque.
[A2] soil_client __del__ blocks 5s :: SoilClient.__del__ can block up to 5 seconds when GC'd on the event-loop thread while closing its exit stack.
[A3] generation_store atexit clobber :: Per-instance atexit registration meant the oldest hot-reload generation persisted last, overwriting the pickle with stale data.
[A4] jeles RRF fusion shipped :: Cross-source search results are now fused via shared reciprocal-rank fusion.

insights.insight: 3 of 4 atoms (A1, A2, A3) are object-finalizer lifecycle bugs: cleanup logic running at GC/exit time interacted with a resource (pool lock, event loop, pickle file) whose state the finalizer cannot see. The fleet pattern is 'destructors must only enqueue, never operate'.

input:
ATOMS:
[B1] vault populated :: 3 API keys plus GH_TOKEN and DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN now live in the encrypted vault; gh authenticates via keyring.
[B2] climate almanac scaffolded :: Catalog-first open index of public climate data; local repo only, org and domain unclaimed.
